Game"],"categories":[{"id":9,"name":"Social"},{"id":6,"name":"Games"}],"directory_entry":{"guild_count":7300,"detailed_description":"__WHAT IS LETTER LEAGUE?__

Letter League is an Activity that we've developed here at Discord. Letter League is a game where you and your friends take turns placing letters on a shared game board to create words in a crossword-style. Spelling words with high earning letters and placing letters on special spaces earn players more points, so get your dictionaries and thesauri ready!

__HOW TO PLAY LETTER LEAGUE__

These instructions may be slightly different on mobile. 
Note: When playing with more than 20 people you may experience some technical issues. For the best experience, we recommend games with up to 6 players. 

1. After launching the game, you can adjust your game settings by selecting the hamburger icon in the upper right-hand corner and the cogwheel button to navigate to Edit Game Settings. 

While there, you can select the length, scoring, and the timer settings you would like to set for your game.



2. You can also choose between two different scoring settings: 

 - **Wild**: The default setting, when a letter is multiplied it keeps its improved score. Letters will be colored in to show which multipliers have been applied to them, so the next time someone scores big you can use those new and improved letters for yourself. 
 - **Classic**: Letters each have a point value in the lower right. When you play a word, you score the points of all the letters you used. Play letters on multiplier squares to get higher scores!  
For this example, we will be playing Wild

3. Once the game begins, use the set of letters located near the bottom to create words by selecting a tile and then selecting its destination or dragging it there.

 - The numbers on each tile represents the amount of points you would score when placing those letters on those tiles. You can increase your scoring by placing your letters on squares that improve your word’s total score. 



4. If a player is unable to form a valid word, they can either swap their tiles by pressing the Swap button located above their set of letters, or they must pass their turn by selecting the Pass Turn button located underneath the timer.



5. The player with the most points at the end of the game wins!



6. Need a refresher of how to play the game? **Beat the dealer by getting as close as possible to 21 without going over!**

- You'll be dealt two cards.
- Click on the deck to take another card or stand to keep your total.
- If your hand goes over 21, you bust and lose the round.
- After everyone stands, the dealer plays their hand.
- The closest to 21 without busting wins!

**Play with friends!**

-  Party up with a max of 8 people in your server.

Game","Classic","IAP"],"categories":[{"id":6,"name":"Games"},{"id":4,"name":"Entertainment"},{"id":9,"name":"Social"}],"directory_entry":{"guild_count":54100,"detailed_description":"__WHAT IS POKER NIGHT?__

The Poker Night Activity is a Texas hold 'em style game we developed here at Discord. You can play with up to 7 players total per game (you + 6 others), and have up to 17 additional spectators max.

__HOW TO PLAY POKER NIGHT__

These instructions may look slightly different on mobile devices. 

1. After launching the game, you can tap on Casual (located on the board) to change the game type to Showdown or stick to Casual, or tap on Join Table to start the game.


2. Here is a breakdown of each game mode.

 - **Casual**: No limitation to your number of buy-ins (play as much as you want). Bots allowed. Winnings reset when you leave the table. Customizable Table settings.

 - **Showdown**: Buy-ins are from limited Chip Reserve. No bots allowed. Winnings distributed to your Chip Reserves. Compete with your Server for the top spot on the Showdown Letterboard. You can learn more about Showdown in the section below.

 - Once you’ve decided on which game mode to play, tap on Join Table. For this example, we’ll be playing Casual.


3. You can invite other players or tap on Add Bot in the top left to add bots to the table.

4. If you want to remove a bot from the table, hover over their profile avatar and tap on it when you see the X appear.


5. If you want to change any of the game settings, tap on Edit Table Settings in the bottom right. After deciding on your settings, tap on Change Settings to save.

6. Here you can change the the following settings:

 - **Turn Timer**: How much time each player has for their turn. Minimum of 15 seconds can be selected up to 90 seconds per turn.
 - **Starting Bank**: Amount of currency a player starts with. You can start with a minimum of $100 up to $10,000.
 - **Big Blind**: The minimum buy-in bet for all players. You can have a minimum of $5 up to $500.


7. After everyone (including the bots) joins the table and you’re happy with your game settings, you can tap on Start Game to start.

8. Each player starts with 2 cards each round, and you can Call (or Check), Fold, or Raise the bid.

 - **Call (or Check)**: Match the current bid or current raise
 - **Fold**: Discard your hand and forfeit the current pot.
 - **Raise**: Raise the current bid higher

9. After each player places their bets for the round, you can either show your cards or fold, depending on your hand. Once everyone shows their cards or folds, the round ends.

10. The game continues until someone wins all of the money from the pot at the end of a round.


11. If you’re unsure of how to play the game while in the middle of playing, you can also tap on the cogwheel in the top right corner and then tap on How To for a guide in-game.



__WHAT IS THE POKER SHOP?__

In our February 2023 update we replaced the Gift Tokens feature with a new in-game Poker Shop where you can claim free content packs or purchase content packs to customize your gameplay with stickers, card backs, dealer skins, and themes. You'll use real currency to purchase anything in the Poker Shop.

__WHAT ARE CONTENT PACKS?__

Content Packs are bundles of in-game cosmetic content with a theme. For example, the Lucky Stars Content Pack has dealer skins, stickers, and card backs.

Some Content Packs will be free to claim while others require purchasing with real currency.

__WHAT IS SHOWDOWN MODE?__

In Showdown Mode players must buy in using funds from their chip reserve. When leaving the game, winnings are deposited into the player's chip reserve. The chip reserve is used to rank players in the same server on the Showdown Leaderboard.

The winner of the previous Showdown Leaderboard Season gains the crown to be worn for the duration of the current Season.","carousel_items":[{"type":1,"url":"https://app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/poker-night/directory_01.gif","proxy_url":"https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/KV6ROYIY7P5U6E2wWmzePkmqqn24wHDu1SJXuU-D2aM/https/app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/poker-night/directory_01.gif"},{"type":1,"url":"https://app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/poker-night/directory_02.png","proxy_url":"https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/EDMto6FUMf888odNIC5WmF49r8OpK29pp47codrOxO4/https/app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/poker-night/directory_02.png"},{"type":1,"url":"https://app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/poker-night/directory_03.png","proxy_url":"https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/38ga1tL7ILxi8PfM0CjN61kMVdvb6zFUSvZlFUYLvec/https/app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/poker-night/directory_03.png"},{"type":1,"url":"https://app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/poker-night/directory_04.png","proxy_url":"https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/ysNxd-zaCT6OMpKBgry2mk_lpVLmus8twKxFRFetCgU/https/app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/poker-night/directory_04.png"}],"supported_locales":["en-US"],"external_urls":[{"name":"FAQ","url":"https://support.discord.com/hc/en-us/articles/1500009655542-Poker-Night-FAQ"}],"short_description":"A Texas hold 'em style card game to prove your Poker prowess! BLAZING 8S?__

Blazing 8s is an Activity that we've developed here at Discord. It is our Crazy Eights-inspired card game that you can play with your friends! The rules are simple — on your turn, discard a card from your hand with the same suit or number as the previous card. Playing special cards allows you to skip other players, reverse the direction of play, and even swap hands with other players. The first person to discard all their cards wins!

__HOW TO PLAY BLAZING 8S__

These instructions may be slightly different on mobile. 

1. After opening up the game and tapping on Join Game, you can select your background and cardback. This will change the themes for ALL players.



2. Once you have enough players (2-5), tap on Start Now to start the game.



3. Each player gets a turn to either play a card from your hand or draw a card (if you don’t have a card you can play). You need to match the color of the card that has been placed already, match the card type, or you can play a specialty card.



4. There are also special cards that you can use against your opponents in your favor. Let’s go over each type.

 - **Wild Eight Card**: When you play this card, you can pick the color of the next suit. This card can be played anytime.
 - **Quick Draw Card**: All opponents draw 1 card.
 - **Wrong Way Card**: Reverse the direction of the game’s play order.
 - **Giddy Up Card**: Skips the next player’s turn.
 - **Oscar’s Swap Card**: Swap your cards with the next player’s cards, you can play this card anytime.


5. The game will end once one player has no more cards left.



6. Game","Classic","Strategy"],"categories":[{"id":6,"name":"Games"},{"id":4,"name":"Entertainment"}],"directory_entry":{"guild_count":43200,"detailed_description":"__WHAT IS CHESS IN THE PARK?__

Chess in the Park is an Activity that we've developed here at Discord for playing chess with your friends! Chess boards are shared across your server, so you can join or spectate any chess game with your in-server friends.

__HOW TO PLAY CHESS IN THE PARK__

These instructions may be slightly different on mobile devices. 

1. After opening up the game, you can tap on Create Game to create your own game or Join Game to join an existing one. If there are existing checkers games in your server, you can view or join them by selecting them.


2. If you’re creating your own game, you’ll see the following options:

 - **Game Name**: Select Generate Game Name to generate a new name.
 - **Unlocked Game**: If your game is unlocked, anyone can join. Locked games require a table code to join.
 - **Timed Game**: Enabling Timed Game limits the time spent by each player on their turn. 
 - **Color**: Pick what color piece you’d like. White, black, or you can select the question mark for it to be randomly selected for you.
 - **Piece Set**: Select a game piece style you’d like to use.
 - **Theme**: Choose the chessboard and background theme you want.

3. After you’ve decided on everything above, tap on Create Game to create your game!


4. Each player gets a turn to move one of their chess pieces on the board. Your game piece can only move based on the type of piece it is: 

 - **King**: moves one square at a time in any direction to a neighboring square. 
 - **Pawn**: moves one square straight forward, but can move two squares on their first move. It can only move diagonally when capturing an enemy piece. 
 - **Knight**: moves in a capital L-shaped path.  
 - **Rook**: moves any number of squares within its line or row. 
 - **Bishop**: moves any number of squares diagonally.
 - **Queen**: moves any number of squares using similar movements to both a Rook or a Bishop.


5. When you move one of your game pieces, the game will disclose to you which spaces you can move a specific piece to with a dark opaque dot and which pieces are available for capture with a red opaque dot.

6. While playing, you can also enable the Planner mode to plan and review your next moves.


7. The goal of the game is to be the first person to set up your chess pieces so that it is inevitable for you to capture the opponent’s King with your next move. If a player cannot save their King from capture, this would be called a Checkmate.

8. Need a refresher of how to play the game while in a match? is a turn-based, competitive, free-to-play game full of nautical nonsense! Effortlessly easy to play but only the best will be able to master the strategies! Play PVP in short battles for intense action or take it easy and play long battles with 24 hour turn times.

Built by a passionate tiny indie team in England and Australia!

⚔️ EPIC PVP BATTLES
- Inspired by Battleship with Tactical Abilities!
- Improve your skills and challenge your friends!
- Climb to the top of the League to reach Diamond!
- Collect rewards from battle to research and unlock new ships!

⚓ CUSTOMIZE YOUR FLEET
- Create your fleet to fit your playstyle.
- Power up your fleet tactics with unique attack abilities like sonar and reveal.
- Select from vikings, pirates and sea monsters.
- Make your fleet stand out from your friends with ship skins.

♟️LONG BATTLES
- Challenge your friends to long battles, giving you a strategic 24hrs per turn.
- No need to idle, we will let you know when your friend has taken their turn.

🏆 COMPETE IN TOURNAMENTS
- Compete in regularly occurring tournaments on our discord server!
- Host your own tournaments with our Discord BattleBot.

🖥️THE HIT GAME NOW ON DISCORD
- Controls and user interface are specifically tailored to ensure a smooth and optimized PVP experience on desktop and mobile devices
- Whether you prefer short or long battles, the controls will deliver a smooth experience

🤝 JOIN OUR DISCORD COMMUNITY OF THOUSANDS
- Discuss ship strategy
- Help shape the future of the game!

from around the globe! Cast creatures, constructs, and powerful spell cards to smash enemy fortresses! Craft your deck, upgrade unique heroes, and unlock their ultimate powers. Compete in seasonal challenges, earn rewards, and rise in the ranks. With endless quests and evolving strategies, every match is a new adventure!


**Features:**

- Rank-Based Matchmaking Battles with users across Discord, or play Friendly match with friends in the same channel/Group Direct Message.

- Seasonal Rank Leaderboard.

- Customize decks with different Hero, Spell, Creature, and Constructs to create a formidable team.

- Create and customize decks for different battle strategies! Use the Hero's special Ultimate combined with the powers of creatures and spells to fight your way to victory!

- Bonus rewards when you're on a win streak!

- Daily and Weekly Quests to earn rewards such as Card Packs, Gold, Copper, and XP!

- Daily FREE gold to claim in the shop!

- Check out the Shop: Starter and Hero Support Bundles, new Cards and Card Packs (Note: Purchasing gold with real currency is only available on Desktop at this time.)

- Join our Discord Community Server: Share your game progress, celebrate wins, chat with devs and other players, and participate in community events!


**How to Grow Stronger**

- Battle to earn XP and Power and increase your Rank. At the end of each Season, claim rewards based on your achieved Rank. Unlock rewards such as card packs, copper, and gold.

- Discover New Locations: With each level gained, you’ll unlock new Locations, discovering more powerful cards and facing formidable opponents.

- Earn Hero XP through competitive battles. As your Heroes level up, you’ll earn cosmetic upgrades, stat increases, ability upgrades, and valuable resources.

- Level up your cards to earn cosmetic upgrades and resources (gold, copper, shards)

- Use resources to expand your card collection, unlock new Heroes, or power up your existing ones!

- Reach Ascendant Rank (the best of the best) to get onto the Leaderboard to earn even more rewards for 1st-10th place every Season.


**Purchasable content:** 

- Location-Locked Hero Support Bundles: Includes card packs, 2 cards, and Shards to help you unlock or level up your Hero and build a strong deck

- Weekly Rotating Value Bundles (can you say *big discounts?*)

- Daily Rotating Cards (collect more to add to your deck or level up the card!)

- Card Packs

- Gold Bundles: Buy Cards from the shop

- Copper Bundles: level up cards, earns Shards to use to unlock and level-up Heroes

Purchases with real currency can only be made from Desktop, but usable anywhere you play. Use your earned in-game gold and copper on any platform to buy new cards and packs!","carousel_items":[{"type":1,"url":"https://app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/spark/Feb25_spark1_compressed.gif","proxy_url":"https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/AiJWGq3hgYiJpc6F-tWjYQDu3mPBG599VonKcxG18fU/https/app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/spark/Feb25_spark1_compressed.gif"},{"type":1,"url":"https://app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/spark/Feb25_spark2.png","proxy_url":"https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/a3UvrTu6rLBb0HyXYEVzFJnnU271qpaScy0Dg8pSdIM/https/app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/spark/Feb25_spark2.png"},{"type":1,"url":"https://app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/spark/Feb25_spark3.png","proxy_url":"https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/elCCOWXdysEG5pNiV0_aQcGvbSpImZFjeT55sxGgDFg/https/app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/spark/Feb25_spark3.png"},{"type":1,"url":"https://app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/spark/Feb25_spark4.png","proxy_url":"https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/O3rdPNRVWjeNZhetBT8pfUBcRyQ7JPq63hQPT5grb7Y/https/app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/spark/Feb25_spark4.png"},{"type":1,"url":"https://app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/spark/Feb25_spark6.jpg","proxy_url":"https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/2QD_dY6cl6fODk8LNIekedtezow13AgyHO_XjMW7bYU/https/app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/spark/Feb25_spark6.jpg"}],"supported_locales":["en-US"],"external_urls":[{"name":"Spark - Hero Tactics FAQ","url":"https://support-apps.discord.com/hc/en-us/articles/27113854710679-Spark-Hero-Tactics-FAQ"}],"short_description":"A fast-paced card battler, compete with players from around the globe! City is more than your average city simulator or one of the tycoon games. It takes the exciting features of two worlds in just the right proportions: the sense of adventure from airplane games, and the need to plan strategically from the city simulators. If you’re starting to think that there are things beyond farming, put your farm sim on hold and start building your town that will gradually become a city, and then a megapolis with the world-class modern airport! We know how plane games can become repetitive over time, so we are constantly improving this city simulator, to ensure that our players are always engaged, both on the ground and in the air.

Whether you want to try out the role of an air tycoon or an airline commander, you’ll find something to love about Airport City.

Build a modern international-class terminal to send an airplane to whichever corner of the world you want. Just get your aircraft in the air and land them in any destination, from a faraway town to a shining megapolis. To make your travels memorable, you can bring back rare artifacts and unique collections. See how many souvenirs can fit in one aircraft!

But it’s not just a flight simulator—you’ll have to apply your outstanding management skills to develop all the supporting infrastructure too, in an amazing airport game! Take care of the entire city next to it, to provide your airport all the required services.
If what you’re looking for in city building games is peaceful gameplay and interactions, this city simulator is exactly what you need. Here you start from a small town and develop it into a great megapolis!

You can create alliances with other players to complete joint quests and participate in competitions. Just find a fellow airline commander from a neighboring city and make your gaming experience twice as much fun! Regular updates with new models of aircraft, buildings, and new destinations, will become an infinite source of entertainment.
Download Airport City and see for yourself how this flight simulator stands out among other airplane games and city building games.

* Test your airline commander skills, develop your own airport and build your own aircraft collection.
* Take on the role of the ultimate tycoon. Build a town, upgrade it to a unique megapolis unlike all the others, and collect profits to support the needs of the airport.
* Enjoy managing an international transport hub, with lots of unique buildings and travel destinations in a breathtaking tycoon game. Improve the infrastructure of your airport and megapolis to increase the number of travelers.
* Interact with like-minded players who enjoy city simulators, flight simulators, and airplane games, just like you. Create alliances and participate in special events. Be the famous business tycoon you always wanted to be!
* Explore the world with your aircraft. Travel to your favorite destinations and bring home unique Player","Watch"],"categories":[{"id":9,"name":"Social"},{"id":4,"name":"Entertainment"},{"id":10,"name":"Utilities"}],"directory_entry":{"guild_count":553000,"detailed_description":"__WHAT IS WATCH TOGETHER?__

Watch Together is a collaborative way to watch YouTube videos with others. In Watch Together, everyone can participate in building a playlist of videos. Watch Together will handle the video syncing for you - no counting down to pressing play! 

__HOW TO USE WATCH TOGETHER ON DESKTOP__

**Adding Videos**

After opening up the activity, you can use the search bar to search for videos or scroll through the list to add a video to the playlist by pressing the add button [+] within the desired video. 
You can also add videos to the shared playlist by pasting a YouTube video link into the search bar. 
As soon as there are videos in the playlist, they will begin autoplaying in order.

**Deleting a Video**

To delete a video from the playlist, select the trashcan icon to the right of the video.
This will remove the video from the playlist and instantly play the next video listed.  
If Sharing mode is not enabled, participants will only be able to delete the videos they have added to the playlist. The host is the only person who can delete any video in Hosting mode.

**Hosting or Sharing**

By default, the person who started Watch Together is the host. In Hosting mode, the host controls what’s playing, pausing, scrubbing, skipping, reordering, and can delete any video from the playlist. However, anyone can add videos to the playlist. 

If the host wants others to be able to control the video playback, they can toggle to Sharing mode. When sharing, all participants have control over the playlist, the video, and their actions to the video state apply to every user in the session. 

We recommend Hosting when in big groups and Sharing when in small groups!


**Adjusting Your Volume**

Volume changes are always local, so if any user adjusts the volume or mutes the YouTube player, only their own audio is affected.

When using Watch Together on desktop, you can adjust the video volume within the video itself using the volume slider in the video or by adjusting your device’s volume. 

On mobile, the volume icon in the video window can only mute or unmute the sound. To control the volume, you need to adjust your device’s volume.


__HOW TO USE WATCH TOGETHER ON MOBILE__

**Adding and Deleting Videos**

After opening the activity on your mobile device, you can use the search bar to search for videos or scroll through the list to add videos to the playlist.



If you wish to delete videos from the playlist, select the Playlist button located in the bottom hub to navigate to the Playlist. Then, tap the vertical ellipsis and select Delete to remove the video from the playlist.



**Hosting and Sharing**

By default, the host will be the person who initiated the activity. As the host, they can choose to share the video playback controls by heading over to the Playlist tab and tapping the lock button beneath the video. Then, toggle the Allow everyone to edit the playlist and video state setting. IS WHITEBOARD?__

Whiteboard is a collaborative whiteboard right inside Discord. You can use tools to draw, write text, add images, upload images, add shapes, and search for and post GIFs and Stickers! Boards are saved automatically, so you can come back to your creations over and over again over multiple sessions. It’s not just what you create, it’s the fun of creating it together!


__HOW TO USE WHITEBOARD__

You can use Whiteboard to create anything you like, from drawings to diagrams to fun birthday cards, but here are some hot tips!

**Create & Find Saved Boards**

When you open Whiteboard, you’ll land on the board that was most recently updated within the channel. If you’d like to use a different board, you can create a new one or navigate to an existing board.

1. Tap the hamburger icon (also known as the menu icon) in the top left corner of the board.

2. Browse the boards that are stored in the channel.

3. Tap to open a board, or create a new one.

 - Your boards are automatically saved to the channel or group message that it was created in. You can create, and view all boards in that space, from the board menu. If a board is not active for 90 days it will expire.

**Drawing**

1. Bring up the toolbar at the bottom of the screen.

2. Select the icon that looks like a pencil.

3. Choose a default color or one from the color picker.

4. Create a masterpiece!

**Sticky Notes**

1. Bring up the toolbar at the bottom of the screen.

2. Select the icon that looks like a paper sticky note.

3. Change color or font.

4. Press on the board to place the Sticky Note, and write on it!

**GIFs & Stickers**

1. Bring up the toolbar at the bottom of the screen.

2. Select the GIF icon.

3. Press the Sticker tab or the GIF tab, search in the text field.

4. Choose the Sticker or GIF you want, it will be placed on the board.

**Upload Images & GIFs**

1. Bring up the toolbar at the bottom of the screen.

2. Select the Image icon (looks like an image with a “+”)

3. Select an image or GIF from your device’s files / photos (accepted file formats are: .png, .jpeg, .jpg, and .gif)

4. The image or GIF will automatically be placed on the board.

**Shapes**

1. Bring up the toolbar at the bottom of the screen.

2. Select the Shape icon.

3. Choose a shape, color, and whether it is filled or hollow.

4. Place a shape on the board by either tapping to place, or selecting and dragging.

**Writing**

1. Bring up the toolbar at the bottom of the screen.

2. Select the Tt icon.

3. Choose a font and color, and write anything you like with your keyboard (analog or digital).

 - Note: Whiteboard is an activity that allows everyone in voice to join (unlimited participants) but is optimized for up to 12 participants at the same time. More people can join the activity, but performance may decline when more people are interacting with the whiteboard, and the more elements placed on the board.

**Board Access**

Boards are saved within a channel or a direct message group. Anyone with access to that channel/group will have access to the boards within that space. Game","Guessing Game"],"categories":[{"id":6,"name":"Games"},{"id":9,"name":"Social"}],"directory_entry":{"guild_count":12100,"detailed_description":"__WHAT IS SKETCH HEADS?__

Sketch Heads is an Activity that we've developed here at Discord. In Sketch Heads, players sketch pictures of a word prompt to get others to guess the prompt correctly.

Note: ⚠There is no way to moderate drawings, so be sure to establish boundaries with your fellow players. 


__HOW TO PLAY SKETCH HEADS__

These instructions may be slightly different on mobile devices. 

**Game Modes**

After launching the game, you can choose between 3 different game modes. Here is a breakdown of each game mode: 

- **Classic**: A competitive battle against your friends where you take turns choosing a secret word to draw while everyone else competes to guess it as fast as possible!

- **Blitz**: A chaotic, cooperative race against the clock where you split into two teams, Drawers and Guessers. Drawers share a canvas and rapidly draw words while the Guessers guess as many as possible before the time runs out.

- **Free Draw**: A canvas where you can sketch freely with friends or solo. You can share these drawings outside the Activity!

If you have decided to play either Classic or Blitz, the Game Setup menu will appear and allow you to select the length and theme of the game.

In Sketch Heads, the first person to start the activity becomes the host and has the ability to select the game mode.


After you have decided on which game mode to play, press Start. For this example, we’ll be playing Blitz. 

**Drawers and Guessers**

1. To get started, choose a role you would like to play by selecting the plus button (+) on either side. You can choose between being a Drawer or a Guesser.  



2. Once the game begins, the Drawers will be given a series of secret words where they will have to do their best to sketch. 


- While drawing, you can use the following tools to help sketch your creation: 

 - **Color Picker**: Choose a color from the list or open the color picker by selecting the multi-colored sphere. 

 - **Brush size**: Choose which brush size you would like to use by selecting one of the size options located to the left of the color list.   

 - **Eraser**: Select the pencil to enable the eraser function. Then, press-and-drag to erase specific areas you would like to remove.

 - **Clear**: Clear the board by selecting the purple bomb and confirming you would like to clear the drawing.


3. While Drawers are sketching, Guessers can type their guesses in the text box located in the lower right-hand corner. As a Guesser, you can guess as many times as you would like until you have discovered the secret word or time has run out.



4. Once the round is over, the Guessers points will be tallied to show your team’s score! 



5. Need a refresher of how to play the game while in a match? []},"tags":["Action","Battle","FPS","Game","Pixelated"],"categories":[{"id":6,"name":"Games"},{"id":9,"name":"Social"}],"directory_entry":{"guild_count":17700,"detailed_description":"Poxel.io is a, io fast-paced first-person shooter that throws you into intense pixelated battles across diverse maps. Choose from a wide arsenal of weapons, master different game modes, and outplay your rivals to claim the top spot. Every match is a test of skill and strategy—do you have what it takes to dominate the battlefield?

How to Play Poxel.io
Invite your friends to play with you by hosting a game with them and playing in real-time together. Play the game more to continue progressing and advancing your levels so you can earn PX coins and buy skins, characters, hats, back items, and more! Keep playing the game, and you can eventually reach the top of the leaderboard, so you can show the world that you are #1 in Poxel.io

Poxel.io is fast-paced multiplayer chaos where sharp reflexes and smart movement are your keys to survival. You’ll need eyes in the back of your head to stay alive—and to climb your way to the top of the leaderboard.

You’re dropped into a maze-like battleground armed and ready. Your goal? Take down enemies while dodging incoming fire. But don’t just shoot anything that moves—some players are your teammates. They’ll be clearly labeled, so watch your fire. What goes around definitely comes around.

You can host private games and invite friends to battle in real time. The more you play, the more you progress—leveling up earns you PX coins and gems, which you can use to unlock cool content.

Poxel.io Tips
- Stick to the walls: Keep your back covered to avoid sneak attacks.
- Take the high ground: Rooftops offer a better view and sniping opportunities.
- Stay alert: Enemies can come from any direction, so keep moving and scanning your surroundings.

Unlock & Upgrade
- Explore over 30 unique maps
- Battle with 20+ weapons, including AK-47s, rocket launchers, snipers, crossbows, grenades, and even knives
- Complete missions to earn PX and Gems
- Unlock 1,500+ skins, characters, hats, back items, and more!

Play often. Play smart. Play with friends. Reach the top and prove you're the best in Poxel.io.

Game Modes
- FFA: Free for All, everyone is your enemy.
- TDM: Team Deathmatch, in which two teams fight for the highest score.
- KC: Kill Confirmed, Collect dog tags from the dead, and reach a certain amount to win the game.

Play with friends or against players from around the world in fast paced PvP action, to see who can become the top player in under three minutes.

🏆 REAL-TIME MULTIPLAYER BATTLE!
Battle it out online against your friends and players from around the world! Each round consists of up to 8 players in a free for all brawl deathmatch, whoever gets the most kills in three minutes is the winner!

🧨 DEVASTATING POWER UPS
Race to collect awesome power ups like the machine gun, mines, rockets, invincibility and even something called a lob-grenuke??? 🤔 Each requires different strategies, can you master them all and battle your way to victory?

🏎 CUSTOMIZABLE KARTS
Cars are so last century, create your own style and stand out from the crowd by customizing your Kart from a wide array of items including: helmets, hats, kart-skins, celebrations, wheels.

🦄 UNLOCKABLE CHARACTERS
Play the Prize Machine minigame to collect dozens of unique and interesting characters, from: Dogs, cats, mice, unicorns, pirates, ninjas, aliens, even a toaster??? 🤔

🕹 PICK UP AND PLAY
Tired of those free to play games that have a hundred different buttons to learn and an encyclopedia of information to remember. Download and just press PLAY to get straight into the action. With its intuitive controls and user friendly interface, SmashKarts. io is truely a pick up and play game that can be enjoyed for a couple of minutes or hours at a time.

🌈 PLAY ON ANY DEVICE
SmashKarts .io is super optimised, works on virtually every device, wont hog your wifi with big downloads and its tiny app size wont clog up your device.

🎖 PLAY YOUR WAY
Don't want to play against other players? Or want to hone your skills on Steky's Speedway? Create your own private games for you and your friends on any level.

If you enjoy fast-paced .io, racing, driving car or MOBA style online games that are easy to pick up but require skill to master, SmashKarts. io is a truly unique and fun way to play PvP with friends or against millions of other players. York Times","Official Wordle","Word game"],"categories":[{"id":6,"name":"Games"}],"directory_entry":{"guild_count":178000,"detailed_description":"From The New York Times Games, it’s the official Wordle on Discord! Each player gets 6 chances to guess a 5-letter word. Guess the Wordle in 6 tries. Each guess must be a valid 5-letter word. The color of the tiles will change to show how close your guess was to the word. Compare results with your friends, and work together to keep your streak going!


**Playing on Discord**

Now you can play Wordle where you’re already hanging out and playing games with friends!

- **Instantly Connect:** Invite friends to play and share your results with the press of the button.

- **Real-time Updates with Friends:** See your own and your friends’ progress in real time through the live channel embed.

- **Daily Summary** Compare your friends’ scores each day with the daily summary of yesterday’s scores sent to the channel. Keep up your group’s streak!



**How to Start Wordle**

Wordle can be played in any text channel, group message, or voice call but to utilize the full feature set we recommend playing in a text channel with friends! Try creating a dedicated #wordle channel to play with friends anytime, or hop on a Voice Call to compete in real time!

Use the  /wordle command to make launching Wordle on Discord easier! Just type /wordle in chat, hit Enter or click the /wordle command from the list, and Enter again to start Wordle in Discord for you and your friends! 
Or click the button to open the full list of Activities, and select Wordle.



**Features:**

- Invite Friends

- Share results

- Group Streaks

- Live embed image of board right in chat

- Summary of yesterday’s group results

- New Puzzle Reminder

- Available on the Discord desktop app, browser app and mobile apps. Player","Watch"],"categories":[{"id":9,"name":"Social"},{"id":4,"name":"Entertainment"},{"id":10,"name":"Utilities"}],"directory_entry":{"guild_count":553000,"detailed_description":"__WHAT IS WATCH TOGETHER?__

Watch Together is a collaborative way to watch YouTube videos with others. In Watch Together, everyone can participate in building a playlist of videos. Watch Together will handle the video syncing for you - no counting down to pressing play! 

__HOW TO USE WATCH TOGETHER ON DESKTOP__

**Adding Videos**

After opening up the activity, you can use the search bar to search for videos or scroll through the list to add a video to the playlist by pressing the add button [+] within the desired video. 
You can also add videos to the shared playlist by pasting a YouTube video link into the search bar. 
As soon as there are videos in the playlist, they will begin autoplaying in order.

**Deleting a Video**

To delete a video from the playlist, select the trashcan icon to the right of the video.
This will remove the video from the playlist and instantly play the next video listed.  
If Sharing mode is not enabled, participants will only be able to delete the videos they have added to the playlist. The host is the only person who can delete any video in Hosting mode.

**Hosting or Sharing**

By default, the person who started Watch Together is the host. In Hosting mode, the host controls what’s playing, pausing, scrubbing, skipping, reordering, and can delete any video from the playlist. However, anyone can add videos to the playlist. 

If the host wants others to be able to control the video playback, they can toggle to Sharing mode. When sharing, all participants have control over the playlist, the video, and their actions to the video state apply to every user in the session. 

We recommend Hosting when in big groups and Sharing when in small groups!


**Adjusting Your Volume**

Volume changes are always local, so if any user adjusts the volume or mutes the YouTube player, only their own audio is affected.

When using Watch Together on desktop, you can adjust the video volume within the video itself using the volume slider in the video or by adjusting your device’s volume. 

On mobile, the volume icon in the video window can only mute or unmute the sound. To control the volume, you need to adjust your device’s volume.


__HOW TO USE WATCH TOGETHER ON MOBILE__

**Adding and Deleting Videos**

After opening the activity on your mobile device, you can use the search bar to search for videos or scroll through the list to add videos to the playlist.



If you wish to delete videos from the playlist, select the Playlist button located in the bottom hub to navigate to the Playlist. Then, tap the vertical ellipsis and select Delete to remove the video from the playlist.



**Hosting and Sharing**

By default, the host will be the person who initiated the activity. As the host, they can choose to share the video playback controls by heading over to the Playlist tab and tapping the lock button beneath the video. Then, toggle the Allow everyone to edit the playlist and video state setting. Now everyone should be able to control the video playback!","carousel_items":[{"type":1,"url":"https://app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/watch-together/directory_01.gif","proxy_url":"https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/kYz-pxVQVYbEwYMVvpmSbysPUujimqPAJzS-fl2o66g/https/app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/watch-together/directory_01.gif"},{"type":1,"url":"https://app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/watch-together/directory_02.png","proxy_url":"https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/kVdGyiq81XhBJudWFTIhKJLqTRUcXF-tz0wEggiYqUI/https/app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/watch-together/directory_02.png"},{"type":1,"url":"https://app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/watch-together/directory_03.png","proxy_url":"https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/XvllIk4uI5r8Ldt2MyDJM7_6vBE3GNBzQK26RXFg9bg/https/app-directory-assets.discordactivities.com/watch-together/directory_03.png"}],"supported_locales":["en-US"],"external_urls":[{"name":"FAQ","url":"https://support.discord.com/hc/en-us/articles/4409342945687-Watch-Together-FAQ"}],"short_description":"Create and watch a playlist of YouTube videos with your friends. irectory_entry":{"guild_count":12800,"detailed_description":"Join over 1 million players and design the cozy garden of your dreams, alongside real friends. Collect and grow rare pets, complete your Garden Journal, and hang out with your friends — or play in solitude, with soothing garden sounds to relax your mind. Whether you check in once a day or stay to hang out, your plants and pets are always growing, even while you're offline!

Collect Rare Pets with Powerful Abilities
Hatch and raise a collection of unique pets — each one brings special perks to help your garden flourish.

Customize Your Avatar
Earn bread by playing and gardening, then spend it on outfits, accessories, and more. With millions of combinations, your avatar (technically they're called "bloblings" btw) is truly your own.

Relax with Friends, Your Way
Chat, garden, and explore at your own pace. Invite friends into your garden for bonuses, help each other grow faster, or simply enjoy the calm of gardening side by side. You can also play solo and enjoy the tranquil companionship of your pets and relaxing nature sounds!

Grow While You’re Away
Your crops never stop growing. Even when you’re offline, you’ll come back to a garden full of life and rewards.

Sign in with Discord or Apple
Jump in instantly with Discord or Apple — no setup required. Cross-play and cross-progression supported on Discord.

Official socials:
On the web: https://magicgarden.gg
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@gamesbyavi
X (we still call it Twitter lol): https://x.com/magiccircle_gg

We are Discord's largest in-app indie game, serving millions of users over the past 6 years for FREE!
Let me show you a few things we do **really** well.

![Fishing Section](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1034825327521837068/1171212828733083688/Artboard_1_copy_4.png?ex=69919e32&is=69904cb2&hm=ff586ec4927acf99c4d4b1a4533b8264eb81de5b838f21d98702ecde7900050a&)

- 6 tools to equip 11 baits
- 42 fish, all of which have variant/chroma versions
- 6 NPCs, with backstories, quests, and full personalities
- 5 locations, with temporary holiday locations at times
- Idle fishing
- Skills and skill challenges
- Collection book
- Leaderboards with daily resets
- and MUCH more!

![Economy Section](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1034825327521837068/1171212828984746044/Artboard_1_copy_4-1.png?ex=69919e32&is=69904cb2&hm=2262fe85c6b1713d830f018c8de90c45b8b41b3ddc3e884241122d935c9aa3dc&)

- Global user to user marketplace
- Virtual pets: Level, breed, care for, and fight with
- 265+ unique items
- 100+ unique skins
- Farming: Care for a farm and sell for profit
- Adventures: Unique evolving storylines with exciting rewards
- Server events: Manage giveaways, events, and item/coin donations to your server with built in tools
- and MUCH more!

![Competition Section](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1034825327521837068/1171212829181886614/Artboard_1_copy_4-2.png?ex=69919e32&is=69904cb2&hm=f9c19687738ca2afe07f96425930de543565c0613d4056390441a33218a583f4&)

- Fighting: Wager against your friends in custom fight games
- TTT/C4
- Pet fighting
- Global hourly lottery

![Reminders Section](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1034825327521837068/1171212829416755260/Artboard_1_copy_4-3.png?ex=69919e32&is=69904cb2&hm=a5d2936221c420f99dbe8675dc63f864fd6bfcc75c65b01117306e83cab8c4a6&)

- One of the most advance reminder systems in a discord bot
- Create reminders with simple to use controls
- Reminders can be one time, or recurring
- Share reminders with friends to get the same reminder at the same time

![Developers Section](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1034825327521837068/1171212829634863154/Artboard_1_copy_4-4.png?ex=69919e32&is=69904cb2&hm=7a2077a96c1bbbba9cd3f4e1da441a34302ac835e091396508abe13510b7afa0&)

- Monthly, sometimes weekly, updates
- Dedicated support server
- Developers interact in the community server, daily
- Open to feedback and constructive criticism

Invite our bot. > - Level up, get swords and armors and beat dungeon bosses to **unlock new commands**
> - There are a total of 20 dungeons: the battle mechanics are quite simple and interactive!
> - **Type `rpg start` or `/start` to learn how to play!**
> - See all commands with `rpg help` or `/help`!

# **Here are the most basic commands!**

# Statistic Commands

- `profile` — Check your progress
- `inventory` — If you got items, you can see them here
- `quest` — Simple quests that will provide XP and coins

# Fighting commands

- `hunt`, `adventure` — The most basic commands to get coins and XP
- `heal` — If you lost too many HP, buy a life potion and heal yourself
- `duel` — Fight with other players to get XP and coins
- `dungeon`, `miniboss` — Two times a day, you can try to beat a boss/miniboss with the help of other players!
- `arena` — One time a day, you can start an arena event! Other players can join to get cookies

# Economy commands

- `shop` — Here you can see what kind of stuff you can buy
- `buy`, `sell` — You can sell items from your inventory and buy items from the shop
- `trade` — There are some items that can be traded for other items of similar value

# Working commands

- `chop`, `fish`, `pickup`\*, `mine`\* — The most basic commands to get items
- `craft` — If you have enough items, you can craft swords, armors and special items!
- `recipes` — Here you can see all the crafting recipes

# Gambling commands

- Bet your coins with commands like: `dice`, `blackjack`, `slots`, `coinflip`, `multidice`\*, `wheel`\*


> There are **a lot** of other commands such as `guild`\*, `daily`, `cook`\*, `enchant`\*, `time travel`\*, `pets`\* and more!

York Times","Official Wordle","Word game"],"categories":[{"id":6,"name":"Games"}],"directory_entry":{"guild_count":178000,"detailed_description":"From The New York Times Games, it’s the official Wordle on Discord! Each player gets 6 chances to guess a 5-letter word. Guess the Wordle in 6 tries. Each guess must be a valid 5-letter word. The color of the tiles will change to show how close your guess was to the word. Compare results with your friends, and work together to keep your streak going!


**Playing on Discord**

Now you can play Wordle where you’re already hanging out and playing games with friends!

- **Instantly Connect:** Invite friends to play and share your results with the press of the button.

- **Real-time Updates with Friends:** See your own and your friends’ progress in real time through the live channel embed.

- **Daily Summary** Compare your friends’ scores each day with the daily summary of yesterday’s scores sent to the channel. Keep up your group’s streak!



**How to Start Wordle**

Wordle can be played in any text channel, group message, or voice call but to utilize the full feature set we recommend playing in a text channel with friends! Try creating a dedicated #wordle channel to play with friends anytime, or hop on a Voice Call to compete in real time!

Use the  /wordle command to make launching Wordle on Discord easier! Just type /wordle in chat, hit Enter or click the /wordle command from the list, and Enter again to start Wordle in Discord for you and your friends! 
Or click the button to open the full list of Activities, and select Wordle.



**Features:**

- Invite Friends

- Share results

- Group Streaks

- Live embed image of board right in chat

- Summary of yesterday’s group results

- New Puzzle Reminder

- Available on the Discord desktop app, browser app and mobile apps.
